SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.stream

Record Class Stream<F,A>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.stream.Stream<F,A>
Type Parameters:
F - The effect witness (e.g., IO.µ, Task.µ).
A - The type of elements in the stream.
public record Stream<F,A>(Higher<F,Maybe<Tuple<A,Stream<F,A>>>> step) extends Record
A lazy, resource-safe data stream evaluated within an effect context F.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Stream(Higher<F,Maybe<Tuple<A,Stream<F,A>>>> step)
    Creates an instance of a Stream record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Stream

      public Stream(Higher<F,Maybe<Tuple<A,Stream<F,A>>>> step)
      Creates an instance of a Stream record class.
      Parameters:
      step - the value for the step record component

      public <B> Stream<F,B> flatMap(Function<A,Stream<F,B>> fn, Monad<F> monad)

      public static <F, R, A> Stream<F,A> bracket(Higher<F,R> acquire, Function<R,Stream<F,A>> use, Function<R,Higher<F,Void>> release, Monad<F> monad)
      Resource-safe bracket operation for streams.

    • onFinalize

      public Stream<F,A> onFinalize(Higher<F,Void> finalizer, Monad<F> monad)
      Attaches a finalizer to be executed when the stream ends.

    • parEvalMap

      public <B> Stream<Task.µ,B> parEvalMap(int parallelism, Function<A,Task<B>> fn)
      Concurrently evaluates effects within a stream while preserving order. Specific to Task context.

    • concat

      public static <F, A> Stream<F,A> concat(Stream<F,A> s1, Stream<F,A> s2, Monad<F> monad)

    • foldl

      public <B> Higher<F,B> foldl(B seed, BiFunction<B,A,B> fn, Monad<F> monad)
      Folds the stream into a single value within the effect context.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • step

      public Higher<F,Maybe<Tuple<A,Stream<F,A>>>> step()
      Returns the value of the step record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the step record component
